---
title: "MAD213 Weekly Schedule" 
description: "MAD213 syllabus"
date: 2020-10-08T11:00:00-05:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: [mad213_syllabus]
comments: false
---

Dear all, 

I have set zoom meeting link for MAD213. Check out its detail [here](https://evdekal.hacettepe.edu.tr)

Below, you can find detailed weekly schedule of MAD213.



`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("hammer_and_pick")`

![](/images/scoob.jpg){width=30% }

```{r , echo=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
text_tbl <- data.frame(
Date=c("October 9","October 16","October 23","October 30","November 6","November 13","November 20","November 27","December 4","December 11","December 18","December 25","January 1","January 8"),
Topic=c("Introduction", "Basic definitions and concepts", "Measures of location and dispersion", "Representing data graphically", "Distributions", "t tests", "Midterm 1", "ANOVA", "Regression", "Correlation", "Confidence intervals", "Chi square tests","Public Holiday: New Year","Midterm 2")
)

kbl(text_tbl,escape = F) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)%>%
  column_spec(1, width = "8em")%>%
    column_spec(2, width = "40em")%>%
  row_spec(13, background = "green", color="white")%>%
  row_spec(7, color="red")%>%
  row_spec(14, color="red")

```
